description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named windows that triggers on push to the master branch, excluding README.md, LICENSE.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, and CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md. The workflow should run a build-all-matrix job on a Windows 11 environment with a concurrency group that cancels in-progress runs. The job should check out the repository and a submodule, set up the MSVC environment, build and test the project with different architectures and build types, and upload the resulting MSI packages as artifacts.
